title: cirsium mongolicum
intro: Cirsium mongolicum, also known as the Mongolian thistle, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its prickly stems and purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cirsium mongolicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential applications in modern medicine.
